ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ngos_vos" (
  "ngo_vo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NGO/VO */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the NGO/VO */,
  "registration_no" TEXT /* Registration number of the NGO/VO */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the NGO/VO is registered */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the NGO/VO is registered */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the NGO/VO */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the NGO/VO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the NGO/VO */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the NGO/VO was established */,
  "_sector_focus" TEXT /* Sector focus of the NGO/VO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ngo_vo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "ngo_vo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NGO/VO the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the NGO/VO */,
  "pincode" TEXT /* Pincode of the address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_ngo_vo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ngo_vo_id") REFERENCES ngos_vos ("ngo_vo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ngo_vo_sectors" (
  "ngo_vo_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NGO/VO-sector relationship */,
  "ngo_vo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NGO/VO */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "sector_focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the NGO/VO in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ngo_vo_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ngo_vo_sectors_ngo_vo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ngo_vo_id") REFERENCES ngos_vos ("ngo_vo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ngo_vo_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "ngo_vo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NGO/VO conducting the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector related to the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_ngo_vo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ngo_vo_id") REFERENCES ngos_vos ("ngo_vo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "ngo_vo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NGO/VO undertaking the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_ngo_vo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ngo_vo_id") REFERENCES ngos_vos ("ngo_vo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding */,
  "ngo_vo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NGO/VO receiving the funding */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of funding */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Description of funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_ngo_vo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ngo_vo_id") REFERENCES ngos_vos ("ngo_vo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date of the impact */,
  "impact_location" TEXT /* Location of the impact */,
  "impact_metric" TEXT /* Metric of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: City where the NGO/VO is registered
State where the NGO/VO is registered
ID of the NGO/VO the address belongs to
Unique identifier for each NGO/VO-sector relationship
Focus area of the NGO/VO in the sector
ID of the NGO/VO conducting the activity
ID of the sector related to the activity
ID of the NGO/VO undertaking the project
ID of the NGO/VO receiving the funding
Role of the user (e.g., admin, user)
Unique identifier for each access log
ID of the user accessing the database
Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel)
